title: pilosocereus laniflorus
intro: Pilosocereus laniflorus, also known as the woolly ball cactus, is a species of cactus that belongs to the family Cactaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and prevent infection. The health benefits of pilosocereus laniflorus include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's stems are typically harvested, dried, and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
